phonetic: 藢d蕭i藧 pi藧 藞et蕛
meaning: gallons per hour 姣忓皬鏃跺姞浠戞暟,鍔犱粦[灏忔椂]
examples: The false promotion of JDB has confused the public about the two different herbal tea brands, which has infringed on the rights of GPH, the ruling said.
For example, allegedly, he did not disclose that he also would be soliciting investments in GPH.
That activity not only altered his role at GPH but may well have constituted engaging in private securities transactions, for which separate approval is required.
